name: Absalon Invest PensionPlanner Moderat
summary: Absalon Invest PensionPlanner Moderat is a balanced mutual fund of fund launched and managed by Absalon Capital Fondsm√É¬¶glerselskab A/S. It invests in funds that invest in the public equity and fixed income markets across the globe. For its equity portion, the fund seeks to invest in other funds that invest in the stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. It invests in funds that invest in the stocks of large-cap and mid-cap companies. For its fixed income portion, the fund invests in funds that invest in bonds with a maturity of up to 3 years. It employs active management style to manage its portfolio. The fund benchmarks the performance of its portfolio against a composite index comprising of 40% MSCI World Index Total Return Net, 30% Nordea Constant Maturity Index 2y, and 30% Nordea Constant Maturity Index 3y. It was formerly known as Absalon Invest - Moderat. Absalon Invest PensionPlanner Moderat was formed on June 22, 2009 and is domiciled in Denmark.
